fields.Name: Eventbrite
fields.Description: Eventbrite Platform REST API v3 connector. Read events, organizations, venues, organizers, ticket classes, orders, attendees, discounts and reference data; incremental on orders/attendees (changed_since); create/update/delete on events, ticket classes, venues, discounts, webhooks. OAuth2 bearer / private token.

Configuration.AuthNote: All requests must carry a valid OAuth token. Two modes: (1) Personal/private token issued per app from the user's apps page (single-user integration) — used directly as a Bearer token; (2) full OAuth2 authorization-code flow for multi-user apps (redirect user to authorizeURL, exchange code at tokenURL). Token may also be passed as a query param ?token=<token> but the Authorization header is preferred. An App Key identifies the app in the OAuth handshake (not secret).
Configuration.APIVersioningNote: Version encoded in the URL path as /v3/.

PaginationDefaults.notes: List responses are an object with a `pagination` sub-object plus the resource array under a named key (e.g. `events`, `attendees`, `orders`, `venues`, `categories`). The `pagination` object: object_count (optional), page_number (required, starts at 1), page_size (required), page_count (optional), continuation (string token, optional), has_more_items (boolean). Preferred paging is the continuation token: when `has_more_items` is true, re-request with ?continuation=<continuation>. When all records are returned, the `continuation` key is absent. page_number is also available but continuation is the canonical mechanism.

Configuration.IncrementalSyncDescription: List endpoints for Orders (by Event / by User / by Organization / search) and Attendees (by Event / by Organization) accept a `changed_since` (datetime) query param returning resources changed on or after that time. Both Order and Attendee carry a `changed` response field that is the change timestamp to use as the watermark cursor. Order/Attendee list-by-event also accept `last_item_seen` for keyset-style resume in conjunction with changed_since. Events, Venues, Organizers, etc. expose a `changed` field on the object but the list endpoints are not documented to accept changed_since; lookups (Category/Subcategory/Format) are static reference data with no incremental filter.

RateLimit.notes: Documented default rate limit is 1,000 calls per hour. Exceeding it returns HTTP 429 with error code HIT_RATE_LIMIT. Higher limits may be granted on request.

Webhooks.notes: Create a webhook by POSTing { endpoint_url, actions, event_id? } to the organization webhooks endpoint (legacy global /webhooks/ also documented). The webhook payload delivered to endpoint_url contains api_url, action, endpoint_url, user_id, and webhook_id; the api_url points at the changed resource to GET. event_id is optional and scopes a webhook to a single event.

ErrorResponseShape.description: Eventbrite errors return JSON with status_code, error (machine code), and error_description.

fields.Name: User
fields.Description: An Eventbrite account. Users are members of Organizations.

fields.Name: id
fields.Description: User ID.

fields.Name: name
fields.Description: User display name.

fields.Name: first_name
fields.Description: User first name.

fields.Name: last_name
fields.Description: User last name.

fields.Name: emails
fields.Description: List of the user's email addresses (each with email, verified, primary).

fields.Name: Organization
fields.Description: A business structure in which Events are created and managed. Owned by one User; groups Members, Roles, Venues.

fields.Name: id
fields.Description: Organization ID.

fields.Name: name
fields.Description: Organization name.

fields.Name: vertical
fields.Description: Business vertical: default or music.

fields.Name: locale
fields.Description: Organization locale (e.g. en_US).

fields.Name: image_id
fields.Description: ID of the image for the Organization.

fields.Name: _type
fields.Description: Resource type marker, always 'organization'.

fields.Name: Event
fields.Description: An Eventbrite Event, owned by one Organization. Holds listing, scheduling, status and capacity details.

fields.Name: id
fields.Description: Event ID.

fields.Name: name.text
fields.Description: Event name (plain text).

fields.Name: name.html
fields.Description: Event name (HTML).

fields.Name: summary
fields.Description: Short event summary (max 140 chars; mutually exclusive with description).

fields.Name: description.text
fields.Description: Event description (plain text).

fields.Name: description.html
fields.Description: Event description (HTML).

fields.Name: url
fields.Description: URL of the event listing page on eventbrite.com.

fields.Name: vanity_url
fields.Description: Vanity URL of the event listing page.

fields.Name: start.timezone
fields.Description: Olson timezone for event start.

fields.Name: start.local
fields.Description: Event start in local naive time.

fields.Name: start.utc
fields.Description: Event start in UTC.

fields.Name: end.timezone
fields.Description: Olson timezone for event end.

fields.Name: end.local
fields.Description: Event end in local naive time.

fields.Name: end.utc
fields.Description: Event end in UTC.

fields.Name: created
fields.Description: Event creation date and time.

fields.Name: changed
fields.Description: Date and time of most recent change to the Event.

fields.Name: status
fields.Description: Event status: draft, live, started, ended, completed, canceled.

fields.Name: currency
fields.Description: ISO 4217 currency code.

fields.Name: online_event
fields.Description: True if the event is online-only (no venue).

fields.Name: organization_id
fields.Description: Organization owning the event.

fields.Name: organizer_id
fields.Description: ID of the event organizer.

fields.Name: venue_id
fields.Description: Event venue ID.

fields.Name: format_id
fields.Description: Event format ID.

fields.Name: category_id
fields.Description: Event category ID.

fields.Name: subcategory_id
fields.Description: Event subcategory ID.

fields.Name: logo_id
fields.Description: Image ID of the event logo.

fields.Name: listed
fields.Description: True if publicly searchable on Eventbrite.

fields.Name: shareable
fields.Description: True if social sharing buttons are shown.

fields.Name: invite_only
fields.Description: True if only invitees can see the event page.

fields.Name: show_remaining
fields.Description: True if remaining ticket count is shown on the event page.

fields.Name: password
fields.Description: Event password for unlisted mode.

fields.Name: capacity
fields.Description: Maximum number of tickets that can be sold.

fields.Name: capacity_is_custom
fields.Description: True if capacity is custom-set rather than summed from ticket classes.

fields.Name: tx_time_limit
fields.Description: Maximum duration (seconds) of a transaction.

fields.Name: hide_start_date
fields.Description: True if the start date is hidden.

fields.Name: hide_end_date
fields.Description: True if the end date is hidden.

fields.Name: locale
fields.Description: Event locale (e.g. en_US).

fields.Name: is_locked
fields.Description: True if the event is locked.

fields.Name: privacy_setting
fields.Description: Privacy setting (e.g. unlocked).

fields.Name: is_externally_ticketed
fields.Description: True if the event is externally ticketed.

fields.Name: is_series
fields.Description: True if the event is part of a series.

fields.Name: is_series_parent
fields.Description: True if the event is the series parent.

fields.Name: is_reserved_seating
fields.Description: True if the event uses reserved seating.

fields.Name: show_pick_a_seat
fields.Description: For reserved seating, whether attendees can pick seats.

fields.Name: show_seatmap_thumbnail
fields.Description: For reserved seating, whether the seatmap thumbnail is shown.

fields.Name: show_colors_in_seatmap_thumbnail
fields.Description: For reserved seating, whether the seatmap thumbnail has colors.

fields.Name: is_free
fields.Description: True if the event is free.

fields.Name: source
fields.Description: Source of the event (defaults to api).

fields.Name: version
fields.Description: Event version.

fields.Name: resource_uri
fields.Description: Absolute URL to the canonical event representation.

fields.Name: EventSeries
fields.Description: A repeating Event with a sequence of dates. Made up of a parent Event and child Events for each date.

fields.Name: id
fields.Description: Event Series ID (the parent event ID).

fields.Name: name.text
fields.Description: Series name (plain text).

fields.Name: description.text
fields.Description: Series description (plain text).

fields.Name: start.utc
fields.Description: Series parent start in UTC.

fields.Name: start.timezone
fields.Description: Olson timezone for series start.

fields.Name: end.utc
fields.Description: Series parent end in UTC.

fields.Name: currency
fields.Description: ISO 4217 currency code.

fields.Name: organizer_id
fields.Description: ID of the series organizer.

fields.Name: venue_id
fields.Description: Series venue ID.

fields.Name: is_series
fields.Description: True (series flag).

fields.Name: is_series_parent
fields.Description: True if this is the series parent.

fields.Name: Venue
fields.Description: The location where an Event takes place. Venues are grouped by Organization.

fields.Name: id
fields.Description: Venue ID.

fields.Name: name
fields.Description: Venue name.

fields.Name: age_restriction
fields.Description: Age restriction of the venue.

fields.Name: capacity
fields.Description: Maximum number of tickets sellable for the venue.

fields.Name: latitude
fields.Description: Latitude coordinate of the venue address.

fields.Name: longitude
fields.Description: Longitude coordinate of the venue address.

fields.Name: address.address_1
fields.Description: Street/location address part 1.

fields.Name: address.address_2
fields.Description: Street/location address part 2.

fields.Name: address.city
fields.Description: City.

fields.Name: address.region
fields.Description: ISO 3166-2 region/state/province code.

fields.Name: address.postal_code
fields.Description: Postal code.

fields.Name: address.country
fields.Description: ISO 3166-1 2-character country code.

fields.Name: address.latitude
fields.Description: Latitude portion of the address coordinates.

fields.Name: address.longitude
fields.Description: Longitude portion of the address coordinates.

fields.Name: address.localized_address_display
fields.Description: Address display localized to the address country.

fields.Name: address.localized_area_display
fields.Description: Area display localized to the address country.

fields.Name: Organizer
fields.Description: The public-facing entity organizing an Event. Does not own events and has no Eventbrite account.

fields.Name: id
fields.Description: Organizer ID.

fields.Name: name
fields.Description: Organizer name.

fields.Name: description.text
fields.Description: Organizer description (plain text).

fields.Name: description.html
fields.Description: Organizer description (HTML).

fields.Name: long_description.text
fields.Description: Organizer long description (plain text).

fields.Name: long_description.html
fields.Description: Organizer long description (HTML).

fields.Name: logo_id
fields.Description: Image ID of the organizer logo.

fields.Name: url
fields.Description: URL to the organizer's page on Eventbrite.

fields.Name: num_past_events
fields.Description: Number of past events the organizer has.

fields.Name: num_future_events
fields.Description: Number of upcoming events the organizer has.

fields.Name: twitter
fields.Description: Organizer Twitter handle.

fields.Name: facebook
fields.Description: Organizer Facebook page.

fields.Name: resource_uri
fields.Description: Absolute URL to the canonical organizer representation.

fields.Name: TicketClass
fields.Description: A ticket type (free, paid or donation) for an Event. Multiple ticket classes can belong to one Event.

fields.Name: id
fields.Description: Ticket Class ID.

fields.Name: event_id
fields.Description: Event the ticket class belongs to.

fields.Name: name
fields.Description: Ticket Class name.

fields.Name: description
fields.Description: Ticket Class description.

fields.Name: cost.currency
fields.Description: Display cost currency (ISO 4217).

fields.Name: cost.value
fields.Description: Display cost value in minor currency units.

fields.Name: cost.display
fields.Description: Formatted display cost.

fields.Name: fee.currency
fields.Description: Display fee currency (ISO 4217).

fields.Name: fee.value
fields.Description: Display fee value in minor currency units.

fields.Name: donation
fields.Description: True if the ticket class is a donation.

fields.Name: free
fields.Description: True if the ticket class is free.

fields.Name: minimum_quantity
fields.Description: Minimum number of tickets per order.

fields.Name: maximum_quantity
fields.Description: Maximum number of tickets per order.

fields.Name: has_pdf_ticket
fields.Description: True if attendee receives a PDF order confirmation.

fields.Name: delivery_methods
fields.Description: List of delivery methods: electronic, will_call, standard_shipping.

fields.Name: category
fields.Description: Ticket class category: admission, add_on, donation.

fields.Name: quantity_total
fields.Description: Number of this ticket class available for sale.

fields.Name: quantity_sold
fields.Description: Number of this ticket class previously sold.

fields.Name: hidden
fields.Description: True if the ticket class is hidden from the public.

fields.Name: sales_start
fields.Description: Date and time sales begin.

fields.Name: sales_end
fields.Description: Date and time sales end.

fields.Name: sales_start_after
fields.Description: ID of a ticket class whose sell-out triggers this class's sales start.

fields.Name: include_fee
fields.Description: True if the fee is included in the displayed price.

fields.Name: split_fee
fields.Description: True if fee is shown separately from price.

fields.Name: hide_description
fields.Description: True if the description is hidden on the listing page.

fields.Name: auto_hide
fields.Description: True if the ticket class auto-hides when not on sale.

fields.Name: auto_hide_before
fields.Description: Override reveal date for auto-hide.

fields.Name: auto_hide_after
fields.Description: Override re-hide date for auto-hide.

fields.Name: order_confirmation_message
fields.Description: Confirmation message displayed when an order completes.

fields.Name: sales_channels
fields.Description: Supported sales channels: online, atd.

fields.Name: resource_uri
fields.Description: Absolute URL to the canonical ticket class representation.

fields.Name: TicketGroup
fields.Description: A grouping of Ticket Classes, commonly used to apply a cross-event Discount to multiple ticket classes.

fields.Name: id
fields.Description: Ticket Group ID.

fields.Name: name
fields.Description: Ticket Group name (truncated past 20 chars).

fields.Name: status
fields.Description: Ticket Group status: transfer, live, deleted, archived.

fields.Name: event_ticket_ids
fields.Description: Dictionary of ticket class IDs associated with each event ID.

fields.Name: tickets
fields.Description: List of ticket classes (id, event_id, sales_channels, variants, name); populated via expansion.

fields.Name: Order
fields.Description: An order placed against Eventbrite for one or more ticket classes. Holds financial and transactional info. Private.

AccessPath.nesting: Organization -> orders[]; also Event -> orders[] (/events/{event_id}/orders) and User -> orders[] (/users/{user_id}/orders)

fields.Name: id
fields.Description: Order ID.

fields.Name: created
fields.Description: When the order was placed.

fields.Name: changed
fields.Description: When the order was last changed (incremental watermark).

fields.Name: name
fields.Description: Order owner name (prefer over first_name/last_name).

fields.Name: first_name
fields.Description: Order owner first name.

fields.Name: last_name
fields.Description: Order owner last name.

fields.Name: email
fields.Description: Order owner email address.

fields.Name: event_id
fields.Description: Order's Event ID.

fields.Name: time_remaining
fields.Description: Time remaining to complete the order (seconds).

fields.Name: status
fields.Description: Order status: started, pending, placed, abandoned.

fields.Name: promo_code
fields.Description: Discount code applied to the order.

fields.Name: costs.base_price.value
fields.Description: Order amount excluding fees and tax (minor units).

fields.Name: costs.base_price.currency
fields.Description: Base price currency (ISO 4217).

fields.Name: costs.gross.value
fields.Description: Total amount of the order (minor units).

fields.Name: costs.gross.currency
fields.Description: Gross currency (ISO 4217).

fields.Name: costs.eventbrite_fee.value
fields.Description: Eventbrite fee portion of gross (minor units).

fields.Name: costs.payment_fee.value
fields.Description: Payment processor fee portion of gross (minor units).

fields.Name: costs.tax.value
fields.Description: Tax portion of gross (minor units).

fields.Name: resource_uri
fields.Description: Absolute URL to the canonical order representation.

fields.Name: Attendee
fields.Description: A ticket holder for an Event (one attendee per sold ticket). Holds profile, barcode and cost info. Private.

fields.Name: id
fields.Description: Attendee ID.

fields.Name: created
fields.Description: When the attendee was created (order placed).

fields.Name: changed
fields.Description: When the attendee was last changed (incremental watermark).

fields.Name: ticket_class_id
fields.Description: Ticket class used by the attendee.

fields.Name: ticket_class_name
fields.Description: Name of the ticket class at registration.

fields.Name: variant_id
fields.Description: Composite ticket-class+discount id (T12345-D12345).

fields.Name: quantity
fields.Description: Always 1.

fields.Name: event_id
fields.Description: Event the attendee is attending.

fields.Name: order_id
fields.Description: Order under which the attendee's ticket was purchased.

fields.Name: guestlist_id
fields.Description: Guest list ID; null if not a guest.

fields.Name: invited_by
fields.Description: Name of the person who invited the guest; null if not a guest.

fields.Name: checked_in
fields.Description: True if the attendee is checked in.

fields.Name: cancelled
fields.Description: True if the attendee is cancelled.

fields.Name: refunded
fields.Description: True if the attendee is refunded.

fields.Name: status
fields.Description: Attendee status (scheduled to be deprecated).

fields.Name: affiliate
fields.Description: Attendee affiliate code.

fields.Name: delivery_method
fields.Description: Ticket delivery method: will_call, electronic, standard_shipping.

fields.Name: profile.name
fields.Description: Attendee name.

fields.Name: profile.email
fields.Description: Attendee email address.

fields.Name: profile.first_name
fields.Description: Attendee first name.

fields.Name: profile.last_name
fields.Description: Attendee last name.

fields.Name: profile.prefix
fields.Description: Attendee title/honorific (Mr., Ms.).

fields.Name: profile.suffix
fields.Description: Attendee suffix (Jr., Sr.).

fields.Name: profile.age
fields.Description: Attendee age.

fields.Name: profile.job_title
fields.Description: Attendee job title.

fields.Name: profile.company
fields.Description: Attendee company name.

fields.Name: profile.website
fields.Description: Attendee website address.

fields.Name: profile.blog
fields.Description: Attendee blog address.

fields.Name: profile.gender
fields.Description: Attendee gender: male or female.

fields.Name: profile.birth_date
fields.Description: Attendee birth date.

fields.Name: profile.cell_phone
fields.Description: Attendee cell/mobile phone number.

fields.Name: profile.work_phone
fields.Description: Attendee work phone number.

fields.Name: costs.base_price.value
fields.Description: Attendee ticket price excluding fees/tax (minor units).

fields.Name: costs.gross.value
fields.Description: Attendee total cost (minor units).

fields.Name: costs.eventbrite_fee.value
fields.Description: Attendee Eventbrite fee (minor units).

fields.Name: costs.payment_fee.value
fields.Description: Attendee payment processing fee (minor units).

fields.Name: costs.tax.value
fields.Description: Tax charged for the attendee ticket (minor units).

fields.Name: barcodes
fields.Description: List of entry barcodes (barcode, status, created, changed, checkin_type, is_printed).

fields.Name: answers
fields.Description: Attendee answers to custom questions (requires expansion).

fields.Name: resource_uri
fields.Description: Absolute URL to the canonical attendee representation.

fields.Name: Discount
fields.Description: A discount an order owner can use when buying tickets. Types: public, coded, access, hold. Single-event or cross-event.

fields.Name: id
fields.Description: Discount ID.

fields.Name: code
fields.Description: Discount name (public) or secret code (coded/access).

fields.Name: type
fields.Description: Discount type: access, coded, public, hold.

fields.Name: amount_off
fields.Description: Fixed amount off (in event currency, 0.01-99999.99). Null for access codes.

fields.Name: percent_off
fields.Description: Percentage off (1.00-100.00). Null for access codes.

fields.Name: quantity_available
fields.Description: Times the discount can be used; 0 = unlimited.

fields.Name: quantity_sold
fields.Description: Times the discount has been used.

fields.Name: start_date
fields.Description: Local datetime the discount becomes usable.

fields.Name: start_date_relative
fields.Description: Seconds before event start the discount becomes usable.

fields.Name: end_date
fields.Description: Local datetime until which the discount is usable.

fields.Name: end_date_relative
fields.Description: Seconds before event start until which the discount is usable.

fields.Name: ticket_class_ids
fields.Description: List of discounted ticket class IDs for a single event.

fields.Name: event_id
fields.Description: Single event the discount applies to.

fields.Name: ticket_group_id
fields.Description: Ticket group the discount applies to.

fields.Name: hold_ids
fields.Description: Seat hold IDs the discount can unlock.

fields.Name: Question
fields.Description: A custom question presented to an order owner during registration (e.g. terms acknowledgement).

fields.Name: id
fields.Description: Custom question ID.

fields.Name: label
fields.Description: Custom question label.

fields.Name: type
fields.Description: Answer type: text, url, email, date, number, address, dropdown.

fields.Name: required
fields.Description: True if an answer is required.

fields.Name: Answer
fields.Description: An attendee's answer to a custom Question. Returned nested on Attendee/Order via expansion; not a standalone top-level endpoint.

fields.Name: question_id
fields.Description: Custom question ID.

fields.Name: attendee_id
fields.Description: Attendee ID who answered.

fields.Name: question
fields.Description: Custom question text.

fields.Name: type
fields.Description: Answer type: text, url, email, date, number, address, dropdown.

fields.Name: answer
fields.Description: The answer value (generally a string).

fields.Name: Category
fields.Description: An Event class (e.g. Music) used to classify Events. Static reference data.

fields.Name: id
fields.Description: Category ID.

fields.Name: name
fields.Description: Category name.

fields.Name: name_localized
fields.Description: Translated category name.

fields.Name: short_name
fields.Description: Shorter category name for small UI spaces.

fields.Name: short_name_localized
fields.Description: Translated short category name.

fields.Name: resource_uri
fields.Description: Absolute URL to the canonical category representation.

fields.Name: Subcategory
fields.Description: A Category subclass (e.g. Classical under Music) used to further classify Events. Static reference data.

fields.Name: id
fields.Description: Subcategory ID.

fields.Name: name
fields.Description: Subcategory name.

fields.Name: parent_category.id
fields.Description: ID of the parent Category this subcategory belongs to.

fields.Name: resource_uri
fields.Description: Absolute URL to the canonical subcategory representation.

fields.Name: Format
fields.Description: An Event format (e.g. Seminar or Talk) describing the style of an Event. Static reference data.

fields.Name: id
fields.Description: Format ID.

fields.Name: name
fields.Description: Format name.

fields.Name: name_localized
fields.Description: Localized format name.

fields.Name: short_name
fields.Description: Short name for the format.

fields.Name: short_name_localized
fields.Description: Localized short format name.

fields.Name: resource_uri
fields.Description: Absolute URL to the canonical format representation.

fields.Name: Media
fields.Description: An image that can be attached to an Event listing (logo, branding). Retrieved by media id; uploaded via a token flow.

fields.Name: id
fields.Description: Image/media ID.

fields.Name: url
fields.Description: URL of the image.

fields.Name: Webhook
fields.Description: A subscription delivering JSON payloads to an endpoint when chosen Eventbrite actions occur (order/event/attendee/etc.).

AccessPath.nesting: Organization -> webhooks[]; legacy global list at /webhooks/

fields.Name: id
fields.Description: Webhook ID.

fields.Name: endpoint_url
fields.Description: Developer-provided URL to which webhook payloads are POSTed.

fields.Name: actions
fields.Description: List of action triggers (e.g. order.placed, event.published, attendee.updated).

fields.Name: event_id
fields.Description: Optional Event ID scoping the webhook to a single event.
